feature: Softhouse UAT — Playwright Sub-Agents for Acceptance Testing
requirement: Improve UAT capability of the softhouse pipeline by adding Playwright-based sub-agents that verify outcomes in a real browser against the live system. Every softhouse task should produce verifiable results that pass UAT.

tasks.title: UAT framework — Playwright test generator for softhouse tasks
tasks.description:
Create a UAT framework that the softhouse pipeline uses to generate and run Playwright acceptance tests after each task completes.

Create `tests/playwright/uat/` directory with:

1. `uat-runner.ts` — UAT test runner that:
   - Takes a task description and generates appropriate Playwright tests
   - Runs against the LIVE admin portal (https://admin.garudax.asla.mn or configurable)
   - Captures screenshots before/after for evidence
   - Returns pass/fail with detailed failure reasons
   - Supports retry (re-run failed tests once)

2. `uat-helpers.ts` — Shared helpers:
   - `loginAsAdmin(page)` — login to admin portal, handle auth
   - `navigateTo(page, section)` — sidebar navigation to any dashboard page
   - `waitForData(page)` — wait for API data to load (no spinners/skeletons)
   - `captureScreenshot(page, name)` — save screenshot with timestamp
   - `assertVisible(page, selector, text?)` — element exists and has expected text
   - `assertTableHasRows(page, minRows)` — data grid has minimum row count
   - `assertNoErrors(page)` — no error banners, no 500 responses
   - `assertBotResponse(page, expectedText)` — bot chat shows expected response

3. `uat-page-checks.ts` — Page-specific acceptance checks:
   - Dashboard: KPI cards visible, health status shows, no error states
   - Participants: table renders, filter works, approve/reject buttons present
   - Margin: stats cards show numbers (not 'undefined'), sparklines render
   - Settlement: cycle list renders, status badges colored correctly
   - Circuit Breakers: instrument list shows, halt/resume buttons work
   - Surveillance: alerts table renders, severity badges colored
   - Tickets: ticket list renders, create form accessible
   - Reports: date picker works, report generates
   - Bot: floating button visible, chat opens, messages send

4. `uat-api-checks.ts` — API contract verification:
   - For each endpoint: verify response shape matches expected schema
   - Check field types (string vs number vs array)
   - Check required fields present
   - Verify error responses have correct structure

Acceptance: Framework compiles. Helper functions work against live admin portal.

tasks.title: Softhouse skill update — add UAT step between Review and Merge
tasks.description:
Update the softhouse pipeline skill to include a UAT verification step after code review.

Modify `/home/vcp/.claude/skills/softhouse/softhouse.md`:

Insert a new **STEP 5.5 — UAT Verification** between Review (Step 5) and Merge (Step 6):

```markdown
### STEP 5.5 — UAT Verification
After all tasks are reviewed and approved, run UAT verification:

1. Rebuild and deploy affected services:
   - `docker compose build <service> && docker compose up -d <service>`
   - Wait for health checks to pass

2. For each approved task, spawn a UAT agent using the Agent tool:
   > You are a Softhouse UAT agent. Your task:
   > - Read the task description and handoff file
   > - Run Playwright tests against the LIVE admin portal
   > - Navigate to the relevant page and verify the feature works
   > - Capture screenshots as evidence
   > - Check for visual regressions (layout, styling, data display)
   > - Verify API responses match expected contracts
   > - Report: PASS (with screenshot evidence) or FAIL (with details)

3. For frontend tasks: UAT agent navigates to the page, checks:
   - Page loads without errors
   - Data displays correctly (no 'undefined', no empty tables)
   - Buttons/controls are interactive
   - CSS/layout is correct (no overflow, no misalignment)
   - Responsive at 1920px and 1024px widths

4. For backend tasks: UAT agent calls API endpoints and checks:
   - Response status code is correct
   - Response body has expected fields
   - Data types match (strings, numbers, arrays)
   - Error responses have proper structure

5. For bot tasks: UAT agent opens bot chat and checks:
   - Bot responds to test messages
   - Responses are actionable (not generic 'use the dashboard')
   - Action buttons navigate correctly

6. If ANY UAT test fails:
   - Mark task as 'uat_failed'
   - Include failure details and screenshots
   - Re-queue for fix (one retry allowed)

7. If ALL UAT tests pass:
   - Proceed to Merge (Step 6)
```

Also update STEP 3 (Execute) to include acceptance criteria validation:
- After each coder agent completes, the agent must also run:
  - `docker compose build <service>` to verify Docker builds
  - `docker compose up -d <service>` to verify container starts
  - Curl health endpoint to verify service responds

Acceptance: Softhouse skill file updated with UAT step.

tasks.title: Playwright UAT tests — admin dashboard pages (all 18 pages)
Playwright UAT tests — bot agent full conversation workflows
Playwright UAT tests — API contract validation
Playwright UAT tests — visual regression with screenshots
UAT integration — softhouse-uat skill for on-demand UAT runs
tasks.description:
Create a new `/softhouse-uat` skill that runs UAT tests on demand.

Create `/home/vcp/.claude/skills/softhouse-uat/softhouse-uat.md`:

```markdown
# /softhouse-uat — Run UAT Acceptance Tests

Runs Playwright-based UAT tests against the live GarudaX platform.

## Usage
- `/softhouse-uat` — Run all UAT tests
- `/softhouse-uat pages` — Run page verification tests only
- `/softhouse-uat bot` — Run bot agent tests only
- `/softhouse-uat api` — Run API contract tests only
- `/softhouse-uat visual` — Run visual regression tests only

## Steps
1. Verify services are running: `curl http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz`
2. Run Playwright tests: `cd tests/playwright && npx playwright test uat/<spec>`
3. Capture results: pass/fail count, screenshots, error details
4. Report summary with evidence

## Exit criteria
- All UAT tests must PASS for softhouse pipeline to proceed to merge
- Failed tests block the merge and require fixes
```

Acceptance: Skill file created and usable via `/softhouse-uat`.
